label: Early LucasArts Pixel Adventure
globalPrefix: classic late-80s/early-90s point-and-click adventure pixel art, hand-dithered shading, chunky readable silhouettes, limited color palette
globalSuffix: clean pixel clusters, deliberate anti-aliasing, no modern 3D rendering, no photoreal textures, no text, no watermark

suspect.prefix: full-body adventure game character sprite style, standing pose, centered framing, clear facial expression, readable outfit details
suspect.suffix: pixel-art portrait composition, strong shape language, era-authentic adventure game look

evidence.prefix: single clue object in classic adventure game inventory art style, object-focused framing
evidence.suffix: high readability at small size, strong contrast edges, pixel-clean details

featured.prefix: adventure game background scene, environmental storytelling, no people
featured.suffix: room-scene composition, moody but readable lighting, classic LucasArts-era pixel atmosphere

negativePrompts.global: photorealistic, cinematic depth of field, smooth gradients, vector art, text, logo, watermark, blurry
negativePrompts.suspect: multiple people, crowd, cropped body, close-up only, modern anime style, glossy 3D materials
negativePrompts.evidence: multiple unrelated objects, cluttered composition, unreadable object silhouette
negativePrompts.featured: people, crowd, modern UI overlays, text, logo
